response: The April marketing campaign generated **45K impressions, 2.3K clicks (5.1% CTR), and 187 signups (8.1% conversion) at a cost of $12K**, resulting in a **$64 customer acquisition cost (CAC)**, with improvements in CTR but a slight drop in conversion rates from March. The team **recommends A/B testing the landing page call-to-action (CTA)** to further optimize performance.
